categories.name: Landmark / Monument
categories.description: Statues, towers, historic buildings, and iconic monuments.

categories.name: Cultural Site
categories.description: Museums, temples, churches, galleries, and culturally significant locations.

categories.name: Nature & Outdoor
categories.description: Parks, beaches, mountains, gardens, and outdoor natural attractions.

categories.name: Neighborhood / District
categories.description: Walkable areas, historic quarters, and culturally distinct neighborhoods.

categories.name: Market / Street Life
categories.description: Local markets, food streets, bazaars, and lively street scenes.

categories.name: Entertainment & Nightlife
categories.description: Clubs, live music venues, nightlife zones, and evening entertainment areas.

categories.name: Food Experience
categories.description: Iconic food streets, food halls, and food-focused destinations (excluding individual restaurants).

categories.name: Activity / Experience
categories.description: Walking tours, hikes, boat rides, and hands-on or guided experiences.

categories.name: Viewpoint / Scenic Spot
categories.description: Observation decks, scenic overlooks, and panoramic viewpoints.

categories.name: Event / Seasonal Attraction
categories.description: Festivals, seasonal markets, special events, and time-specific attractions.
